name: Anti-Bot
description: Comprehensive bot detection: rate limiting, flood detection, bot heuristics, handshake validation, SYN flood detection, dynamic blocking, and CAPTCHA.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Geo-Filtering
description: Country-based access control using geojs.io IP geolocation. Supports blacklist and whitelist modes to restrict connections by country.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Identity Enforcement
description: VPN, proxy, and suspicious IP detection using proxycheck.io. Blocks anonymized connections to protect server integrity.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Profiler
description: Deep JVM profiling for Paper servers — thread sampling with flame graph output, TPS/MSPT, per-plugin CPU attribution, memory & GC analysis. Automatically deploys extender modules.
author: ErikRadovan

name: Spike Detector
description: Detects chunk lag spikes on Paper backends and can trigger automated mitigation for critical chunks.
author: ErikRadovan
